Rootopia Package Report, by pkgnet

Source: vignettes/pkgnetreport.Rmd
pkgnetreport.Rmd

This report on Rootopia is generated by pkgnet, an R package for analyzing other R packages through the lens of network theory.

Function Network

This section analyzes the dependency relationships between functions within Rootopia.

Visualization

Nodes are functions. Edges point in the direction of dependence.

Table

Dependency Network

This section analyzes the recursive package dependencies of Rootopia.

In the plot below, you’ll see the following colors:

  • orange: Rootopia
  • gray: R packages available in every R session by default
  • green: third-party R packages

Visualization

Nodes are packages. Edges point in the direction of dependence.

Table

This report built with pkgnet v0.6.0.
